name: Creamy Dijon Topped Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 18 small Red skin potatoes, roasted and cut in half lengthwise
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl with an electric mixer at medium speed, beat the cream cheese until softened.
2. Add mustard and dried basil to the bowl. Beat until smooth.
3. Stir in chopped black olives, scallions, and red pepper.
4. To serve, pipe or spoon 1 tablespoon of the mixture onto each potato half.
5. Garnish with scallion tips and serve.
Makes 3 dozen appetizers
Source: Reader's Digest, April 1993
